Name: VOW_PARAM
Description: Defines covenant progression requirements based on contribution thresholds for each covenant level.

Fields.Name: Required Contribution (Level 1)
Fields.Description: Minimum contribution required to reach covenant level 1.

Fields.Name: Required Contribution (Level 2)
Fields.Description: Minimum contribution required to reach covenant level 2.

Fields.Name: Required Contribution (Level 3)
Fields.Description: Minimum contribution required to reach covenant level 3.
